title: hemizonia pungens var. septentrionalis
intro: Hemizonia pungens var. septentrionalis, also known as Santa Cruz tarweed or Southern tarweed, is a plant species native to the coastal scrub habitats of Central and Northern California. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hemizonia pungens var. septentrionalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease coughs, and soothe the respiratory system. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
